channel.name: PAS In LOCAL-1-0

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptstep.name: PatientIdentifier

com.mirth.connect.plugins.xsltstep.XsltS.name: PASAPI XSLT Step
com.mirth.connect.plugins.xsltstep.XsltS.template:
1 <xsl:value-of select="concat(translate(substring(//PID.5.5,1,1), $vLower, $vUpper),translate(substring(//PID.5.5,2), $vUpper, $vLower))"/>
GB HOME
10

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptstep.name: HospitalNumber
VisitDate
VisitTime
ClinicCode
DoctorCode
VisitStatusXML
PartialRecord
NHSNumber
GenerateSecondaryHospitalNumber
Check for warnings
PatientId
PatientIdentifier

com.mirth.connect.plugins.xsltstep.XsltS.name: PASAPI XSLT Step
com.mirth.connect.plugins.xsltstep.XsltS.template:
NHS <xsl:value-of select="concat(translate(substring(//PID.5.5,1,1), $vLower, $vUpper),translate(substring(//PID.5.5,2), $vUpper, $vLower))"/>
GB HOME
10

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptstep.name: HospitalNumber
VisitDate
VisitTime
ClinicCode
DoctorCode
VisitStatusXML
PartialRecord
NHSNumber
BookingType
AppointmentAssigneeXML
Check for warnings
PatientId

com.mirth.connect.plugins.rulebuilder.Ru.name: Accept message if "msg['MSH']['MSH.9']['MSH.9.2'].toString()" does not equal "M05"
Accept message if "msg["OBX"]["OBX.3"]["OBX.3.1"].toString()" does not contain "ReportFile"

com.mirth.connect.plugins.xsltstep.XsltS.name: PASAPI XSLT Step
com.mirth.connect.plugins.xsltstep.XsltS.template:
<?xml version="1.0"?>
<xsl:stylesheet version="1.0" xmlns:xsl="http://www.w3.org/1999/XSL/Transform">
<xsl:variable name="vLower" select="'abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz'"/> <xsl:variable name="vUpper" select="'ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ'"/>
<xsl:template match="/"> <xsl:element name="Patient"> <xsl:attribute name="createOnly">1</xsl:attribute> <!--<xsl:if test="//MSH.9.2/text()='A31'"> <xsl:attribute name="updateOnly">1</xsl:attribute> </xsl:if>--> <NHSNumber/> <!--NHSNumberStatus><xsl:value-of select="//PID.3[PID.3.5/text()='NHS']/PID.3.2"/></NHSNumberStatus--> <HospitalNumber><xsl:value-of select="//PID.3[PID.3.5/text()='PI']/PID.3.1"/></HospitalNumber> <Title><xsl:value-of select="concat(translate(substring(//PID.5.5,1,1), $vLower, $vUpper),translate(substring(//PID.5.5,2), $vUpper, $vLower))"/></Title> <FirstName><xsl:value-of select="//PID.5.2"/><xsl:if test="//PID.5.3/text()"><xsl:value-of select="concat(' ',//PID.5.3)"/></xsl:if></FirstName> <Surname><xsl:value-of select="//PID.5.1"/></Surname> <DateOfBirth><xsl:if test="//PID.7.1/text()"><xsl:value-of select="concat(substring(//PID.7.1,1,4),'-',substring(//PID.7.1,5,2),'-',substring(//PID.7.1,7,2))"/></xsl:if></DateOfBirth> <Gender><xsl:value-of select="//PID.8.1"/></Gender> <AddressList> <xsl:for-each select="//PID.11[PID.11.7/text()='P']|//PID.11[PID.11.7/text()='H']"> <Address> <Line1><xsl:value-of select="PID.11.1"/></Line1> <Line2><xsl:value-of select="PID.11.2"/></Line2> <City><xsl:value-of select="PID.11.3"/></City> <County><xsl:value-of select="PID.11.4"/></County> <Postcode><xsl:value-of select="PID.11.5"/></Postcode> <Country><xsl:choose><xsl:when test="PID.11.6/text()"><xsl:value-of select="PID.11.6"/></xsl:when><xsl:otherwise>GB</xsl:otherwise></xsl:choose></Country> <Type><xsl:choose><xsl:when test="PID.11.7/text()='P'">HOME</xsl:when><xsl:otherwise><xsl:value-of select="PID.11.7"/></xsl:otherwise></xsl:choose></Type> </Address> </xsl:for-each> </AddressList> <TelephoneNumber> <xsl:for-each select="//PID.13[PID.13.3/text()='']|//PID.13[PID.13.3/text()='PH']"> <xsl:if test="number(translate(normalize-space(PID.13.1/text()), ' ', ''))=translate(normalize-space(PID.13.1/text()), ' ', '')"> <xsl:value-of select="PID.13[PID.13.3/text()='']/PID.13.1"/> <xsl:value-of select="PID.13[PID.13.3/text()='PH']/PID.13.1"/> </xsl:if> </xsl:for-each> </TelephoneNumber> <MobilePhoneNumber> <xsl:if test="number(translate(normalize-space(//PID.14.1/text()), ' ', ''))=translate(normalize-space(//PID.14.1/text()), ' ', '')"> <xsl:value-of select="translate(//PID.14[PID.14.2/text()='WPN']/PID.14.1,'"','')"/> </xsl:if> </MobilePhoneNumber> <Email><xsl:if test="//PID.13[PID.13.2/text()='NET']/PID.13.4/text()"><xsl:value-of select="//PID.13[PID.13.2/text()='NET']/PID.13.4/text()" /></xsl:if></Email> <EthnicGroup><xsl:value-of select="//PID.22.1"/></EthnicGroup> <IsDeceased><xsl:choose><xsl:when test="//PID.30.1/text()='Y'">1</xsl:when><xsl:otherwise>0</xsl:otherwise></xsl:choose></IsDeceased> <DateOfDeath><xsl:if test="//PID.29.1/text()"><xsl:value-of select="concat(substring(//PID.29.1,1,4),'-',substring(//PID.29.1,5,2),'-',substring(//PID.29.1,7,2))"/></xsl:if></DateOfDeath> <PracticeCode><xsl:value-of select="substring(//PD1.3.3,1,6)"/></PracticeCode> <GpCode><xsl:value-of select="substring(//PD1.4.1,1,8)"/></GpCode> <LanguageCode><xsl:value-of select="//PID.15.4/text()" /></LanguageCode> <InterpreterRequired><xsl:value-of select="//PID.15.5/text()" /></InterpreterRequired> <Risks> <xsl:for-each select="//PID.35"> <xsl:value-of select="PID.35.1/text()" /> </xsl:for-each> </Risks> </xsl:element> </xsl:template> </xsl:stylesheet>

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptstep.name: HospitalNumber
VisitDate
VisitTime
ClinicCode
DoctorCode
VisitStatusXML
PartialRecord
NHSNumber
PatientIdentifier
BookingType
Check for warnings
PatientId

com.mirth.connect.plugins.rulebuilder.Ru.name: Accept message if "msg['MSH']['MSH.9']['MSH.9.2'].toString()" does not equal "M05"

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptrule.name: Appointment Filter

com.mirth.connect.plugins.rulebuilder.Ru.name: Accept message if "msg["OBX"]["OBX.3"]["OBX.3.1"].toString()" does not contain "ReportFile"

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptrule.name: BookingType contains cataract
Appointment Filter

com.mirth.connect.plugins.rulebuilder.Ru.name: Accept message if "msg["OBX"]["OBX.3"]["OBX.3.1"].toString()" does not contain "ReportFile"

com.mirth.connect.plugins.javascriptrule.name: BookingType contains cataract

channel.preprocessingScript: // Modify the message variable below to pre process data return message;
